name: Clamshell
instructions: Lie on your side with your hips and knees bent at 45 degrees.
Keep your feet stacked together and your core engaged.
Rotate your top knee upward as far as you can without moving your pelvis.
Hold briefly at the top, then slowly lower back down.
cues: Don't let your hips roll backward

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with knees bent, feet flat on the floor hip-width apart.
Press through your heels and squeeze your glutes to lift your hips off the floor.
Raise until your body forms a straight line from shoulders to knees.
Hold at the top, then slowly lower your hips back to the floor.
cues: Drive through your heels, not your toes
